description:
The ReqView example project is open showing the SRS (Software Requirements Specification) document. Add a new requirement at the end of the document with the following details:
- Requirement text: 'The system shall automatically log all authentication failures with timestamp, IP address, and username to a secure audit trail accessible only to administrators.'
- Set the 'Status' attribute to 'Draft'
- Set the 'Priority' attribute to 'High'
